briefdescription.para: Device location in a file system.
Maximum number of CC's per antenna 16.
Maximum number of CC's per antenna 16.
Maximum number of CC's per antenna 16.
Number of Antenna TDM slots, per CC 1-8.
Number of Antenna TDM slots, per CC 1-8.
Number of Antenna TDM slots, per CC 1-8.
The AXIS dynamic scheduling control interface is present.
The core has an IRQ port enabled.
The implementation of the PRACH component's static initialization functionality.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 dc 03/08/21 Initial release dc 04/06/21 Register with full node name dc 04/07/21 Fix bare metal initialisation dc 04/21/21 Update due to restructured registers 1.1 dc 06/30/21 Doxygen documentation update dc 10/26/21 Make driver R5 compatible 1.2 dc 10/29/21 Update doxygen comments dc 11/01/21 Add multi AddCC, RemoveCC and UpdateCC dc 11/19/21 Update doxygen documentation 1.4 dc 08/18/22 Update IP version number 1.5 dc 12/14/22 Update multiband register arithmetic dc 01/02/23 Multiband registers update 1.6 cog 07/04/23 Add support for SDT 1.7 dc 11/29/23 Add continuous scheduling 1.8 dc 10/24/25 Correct initialization values 1.9 dc 11/25/25 Update doxygen comments, remove not needed code
